description:
Inline match producing markup in an interpolation (§18 / §7; the example-21 shape). ${ match @view { .List :> { lift

} .Grid :> { lift

} } }. A click sets @view = Grid; the Grid arm lifts its

and the List arm's markup is gone.
rationale: §18/§7 an inline match whose arms lift MARKUP swaps the lifted subtree on @view change (the supported inline-match-in-markup form). Grid -> data-view="grid" present, list arm absent.
